# Baseplate

> Mission control for building Roblox games with AI agents. Baseplate runs coding agents
> inside your Roblox workflow: they playtest the game through a live Studio bridge, read the
> runtime errors they caused, write the fix, and verify it in the running game. It drives your
> own AI account (Claude Code, Codex, Grok or Cursor) and runs locally on your machine.

Baseplate is a desktop app for Windows and macOS, made for Roblox developers. It is not a
hosted service and not an AI subscription: you bring your own agent CLI account, and Baseplate
orchestrates it against Roblox Studio.

## What makes it different

The bridge. A terminal agent can write Luau, but it can't press Play, read the Output window,
or inspect the live DataModel. Baseplate connects agents to an open Roblox Studio session, so
they can run code in the real game, see what broke, and prove the fix works.

## Key capabilities

- **Playtest Copilot**: an autonomous loop — build, playtest, read runtime errors, fix the root cause, re-verify, report "PLAYTEST PASS".
- **Starter kits**: pick a genre (tycoon, simulator, obby, tower defense, horror escape, battlegrounds) and agents scaffold and build the real gameplay loop into it. Works on the Free plan.
- **Exploit Guard**: security audit that finds client-trusting RemoteEvents, explains the attack in plain language, and writes the hardening.
- **Crew / Swarm**: several agents building in parallel with enforced file ownership, each visible in its own tile.
- **Ship Gate**: read-only release review answering "is this safe to ship?" across runtime, security, data-safety, debug and robustness.
- **Economy & multiplayer simulators**: model the game economy and simulate concurrent players to find inflation, progression walls and desync.
- **Live-game Doctor**: inspects a published game through Roblox Open Cloud (live DataStore reads, publish, asset upload).
- **Team collaboration** (Studio plan): shared Kanban board, shared prompt library and live presence across a team.

## Supported agent CLIs

Claude Code, Codex, Grok and Cursor are all first-class structured engines and can be mixed
inside one crew (for example a Claude foreman with Codex and Cursor builders). Gemini CLI runs
as a terminal tile.

## Privacy

Baseplate runs locally. The server, the Studio bridge, your source code and your Roblox Open
Cloud key stay on your computer; the only network traffic is your own agent talking to your own
AI provider. The single exception is opt-in team collaboration (Studio plan), which syncs only
Kanban cards, shared prompts and display names — never code, files or keys.

## Pricing

- **Free** — $0. One agent at a time, full Studio bridge, Rojo sync, Exploit Guard, starter kits.
- **Pro** — $4.99/month or $39.99/year. Up to 5 agents in parallel, Crew swarms, Ship Gate, simulators, Live-game Doctor, asset generator, mission marketplace.
- **Studio** — $12.99/month or $119.99/year. Team collaboration (shared board, shared prompts, presence), up to 10 agents, Crew swarms up to 8 builders.

Cancel anytime. The license key is emailed at checkout and pasted into the app. 14-day refund.
